seoTitle: Derwent Bridge vs Detention — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Derwent Bridge and Detention. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Derwent Bridge vs Detention: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Derwent Bridge and Detention.
heading: Derwent Bridge vs Detention — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Derwent Bridge, Tasmania and Detention, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Detention has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Derwent Bridge (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Derwent Bridge or Detention safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Derwent Bridge has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Detention scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Derwent Bridge scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Detention scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Derwent Bridge or Detention?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Detention has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
